Das Webportal der Bundesagentur für Arbeit möchte Menschen in jeder Lebenslage unterstützen. Jetzt informieren! All you have to know about live, study,work in Germany. All information for people from other countries. The Bundesagentur für Arbeit is a German federal agency that manages job centres and unemployment benefits. It is under the Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs and has around 113,000 employees. If you’ve just moved to Germany and need assistance finding a job or financial support, understanding the difference between the Jobcenter in Germany and the Agentur für Arbeit (employment agency) is crucial. The Agentur für Arbeit (Bundesagentur für Arbeit, Arbeitsagentur, BA or AfA) is responsible for unemployment benefits and the German labour market. The Agentur für Arbeit is not the same thing as the Jobcenter. Jobsuche der Bundesagentur für Arbeit. The German Arbeitsagentur, or Jobcentre, recognizes the unique challenges that foreigners face when entering the German job market. To address these challenges, the agency offers a range of specialized services aimed at facilitating the integration of foreign workers into the German labor force.
